title: Size Exclusion Chromatography coupled to Multi Angle Light Scattering (SECMALS)
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fjg12","text":"To determine the oligomeric state of ZitRMG, 50 ml of fully purified protein sample at approximately 1-4 mg.ml-1 were loaded on a KW-803 column (Shodex) equilibrated at 0.5 ml.min-1 flow rate (Shimadzu HPLC system) and supplemented with either 1 mM ZnSO4 or 1 mM EDTA (Fig. S1). Detection was performed using a MiniDAWN TREOS multi angle light scattering detector and an Optilab T-rEX differential refractometer (Wyatt Technology) (biophysics platform, LEBS/IMAGIF). Molar mass and hydrodynamic radius were calculated with the Astra 6.1.1.17 software using a differential index of refraction (dn/dc) value of 0.183 ml.g-1.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":41,"length":2},{"style":"sub","offset":253,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":110,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":179,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":619,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Paloma Varela
